heading: CERTAIN WATER CONSERVATION INITIATIVES
operative_text: The governing body of a taxing unit by official action of the governing body adopted in the manner required by law for official actions may exempt from taxation part or all of the assessed value of property on which approved water conservation initiatives, desalination projects, or brush control initiatives have been implemented.

defined_terms.term: approved water conservation, desalination, and brush control initiatives
defined_terms.definition_excerpt: approved water conservation, desalination, and brush control initiatives shall be designated pursuant to an ordinance or other law adopted by the governing unit.
